conversations.say: Dee, management's audit flagged our unpreserved camera interval. We need a unified story about the service route so neither of us takes the fall for protecting people.
conversations.offer: Exact service rhythms and local access context
conversations.request: Agree on a shared disclosure boundary before investigators push us further

conversations.say: Maren, I received your message. Let's coordinate our defense for local workers and neighborhood witnesses right now before investigators start demanding names.
conversations.offer: Neighborhood contractor context and coalition backing
conversations.request: Joint advocacy to ensure no witness or worker is used as mystery currency

conversations.say: Rafi, I saw your note. We must keep our ledger entries and informal arrangements tight so outsiders don't scapegoat our block.
conversations.offer: Support and discretion regarding local customer protections
conversations.request: Mutual backing if past favors or informal access surface under scrutiny

public_statement: The neighborhood provides the labor, storage, and routes that keep this building alive. If institutions want a manageable story tonight, they can start by guaranteeing protection and shared authority for the people who actually run the block.

commitments.promise: Coordinate disclosure of the camera gap to protect uninvolved residents
Coordinate neighborhood and contractor protection against outside investigator pressure
Protect local customer records and informal arrangements from public exposure

goal_progress: Coordinated disclosure boundaries with Dee regarding the camera gap and service route access.
Accepted Maren's coordination for joint worker and neighborhood witness protections.
Aligned with Rafi to protect local customer records and informal arrangements from exploitation.
reasoning_summary: As Inez Baptiste in Section 2, my immediate priority is sealing a defensive pact with Dee, Maren, and Rafi so that neighborhood residents and workers are not scapegoated for the service route usage or camera gaps. I accepted commitments with C07, C09, and C10 to ensure our disclosure boundaries hold firm against outside scrutiny.
